hero.headline: From *bare dirt* to backyard dreams — done right
hero.subheadline: We're the crew your neighbors call when they want their yard to actually look like something. Real plants. Real results.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Everything your yard needs
services_section.subheading: From the bones to the finishing touches

services.title: Complete Backyard Renovations
services.description: Patios, new sod, plantings, and bed design. We'll take your empty space and turn it into the yard you actually want to spend time in.

services.title: Plant Selection & Installation
services.description: The right plants in the right spots. We know what thrives in Wilmington's climate and what looks good doing it.

services.title: Landscape Design & Planning
services.description: Got a blank slate? We'll assess your space, give you solid ideas, and map out exactly how to make it happen.

services.title: Ongoing Yard Maintenance
services.description: Keep everything looking sharp with regular maintenance. We handle the upkeep so your investment stays beautiful.

about.heading: Trey and the Hughes Gardening team
about.body: We're Wilmington's go-to landscaping crew, trusted by certified arborists and homeowners who want their yards done right. Whether you're starting with nothing or renovating what you've got, we handle the whole project from design to installation to ongoing care.

reviews.name: Erin S.
reviews.text: They finished our large backyard install today and I'm so excited I had to write this immediately. Couldn't have asked for a better experience from start to finish.

reviews.name: John W.
reviews.text: As a Certified Arborist, Hughes has been our go-to recommendation for clients. They're excellent with installation, plant selection, and maintenance.

reviews.name: Nicholas I.
reviews.text: Best in town. They completely renovated our backyard — patio, sod, plantings, new beds. Big project done in a week and a half.

reviews.name: Forrest T.
reviews.text: One of the best investments we made in our property. Trey assessed our empty front beds, gave us great ideas, and executed perfectly.

cta.heading: Ready to transform your yard?
cta.body: Let's talk about what you want your outdoor space to become. Free estimates, honest advice, and work that lasts.
